sql_code: SELECT (read_clat_p50_ns + write_clat_p50_ns)/1000 as median_latency_ms, * EXCLUDE (run_id, scenario_name, os_tuning,benchmark_tool, fio_command, fio_version, fio_error, valid_measurement, failure_reason, usr_cpu, sys_cpu, ctx, majf, minf, )
AND io_engine = 'psync' AND block_size_bytes = 4096 AND iodepth = 1 AND numjobs = 1
r_code: to_svg <- svgstring(width = output.width.inch, height = output.height.inch, scaling = 1)
### the current table is bound to the variable 'df'
output <- ggplot(df, aes(y = median_latency_ms, x = durability_mode)) +
geom_boxplot() +
stat_summary(fun='median', geom='text', aes(label=round(after_stat(y), digits =2)), vjust=-0.5) +
facet_wrap(~ benchmark_machine_type) +
theme_bw()
plot(output); dev.off(); to_svg() # output to the html page

description: Median Instance Storage Latency by Provider
sql_code: SELECT (read_clat_p50_ns + write_clat_p50_ns)/1000 as median_latency_ms, * EXCLUDE (run_id, scenario_name, os_tuning,benchmark_tool, fio_command, fio_version, fio_error, valid_measurement, failure_reason, usr_cpu, sys_cpu, ctx, majf, minf, )
AND io_engine = 'psync' AND block_size_bytes = 4096 AND iodepth = 1 AND numjobs = 1
AND storage_target = 'local' AND durability_mode = 'none' AND storage_target_filesystem = 'raw'
r_code: to_svg <- svgstring(width = output.width.inch, height = output.height.inch, scaling = 1)
### the current table is bound to the variable 'df'
output <- ggplot(df, aes(y = median_latency_ms, x = benchmark_rw_mode , fill=provider)) +
geom_boxplot() +
stat_summary(fun='median', geom='text', aes(label=round(after_stat(y), digits =2)), vjust=-0.5) +
facet_wrap(~ benchmark_machine_type) +
theme_bw()
plot(output); dev.off(); to_svg() # output to the html page
